queryDef.sql: Select uuid as UUID, sys_dtcreated as Fecha,total as Cargo, IFNULL((ImpPagado),0) AS Abono, divisa as Divisa, TipoCambio, ifnull(ImpSaldoInsoluto,0) as Importe, ifnull(TipoRelacionCFDIPrevios,0) as TipoDoc from ts_cfdi left join ts_rel_pago on ts_cfdi.uuid=ts_rel_pago.IdDocumento where ((MetodoPago='PPD' and Tipo=0) or (UsoCFDI='G02' and(TipoRelacionCFDIPrevios='01' or TipoRelacionCFDIPrevios='02') and tipo=1)) and not rfc_receptor=@rfc_emisor group by rfc_receptor, nombre_receptor, MetodoPago;
